name: instant-api — SLO rollup
description: Service Level Objective rollup for instant-api. Tracks success rate + latency SLIs for the four most customer-visible endpoints (POST /db/new, POST /deploy/new, GET /api/v1/resources, POST /webhook/new) plus per-endpoint break-downs, top errors, and provisioner gRPC latency. SLO budget burn widgets show % of 30-day error/latency budget remaining; red below 25%. Sourced from APM Transaction events emitted by the Fiber NR middleware in track 3.

pages.name: SLOs
pages.description: Success-rate, latency, and budget-burn SLIs for the four most customer-visible endpoints

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) AS 'success %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' FACET request.uri SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 10

widgets.title: p50 / p95 / p99 latency by endpoint (1h, 5m bucket)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration, 50, 95, 99) FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' FACET request.uri TIMESERIES 5 minutes SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Provisioning success rate by resource type (7d)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) IN (200, 201, 202)) AS 'success %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri LIKE '%/new' FACET request.uri SINCE 7 days ago

SELECT count(*) AS '5xx count' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND numeric(httpResponseCode) >= 500 FACET request.uri, httpResponseCode SINCE 24 hours ago LIMIT 20

SELECT clamp_max(clamp_min((percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) - 99.5) / 0.5 * 100, 0), 100) AS 'budget % remaining' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/db/new' SINCE 30 days ago

SELECT clamp_max(clamp_min((percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) - 99.0) / 1.0 * 100, 0), 100) AS 'budget % remaining' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/deploy/new' SINCE 30 days ago

SELECT clamp_max(clamp_min((200 - percentile(duration, 95) * 1000) / 200 * 100, 0), 100) AS 'budget % remaining' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/api/v1/resources' SINCE 30 days ago

SELECT clamp_max(clamp_min((percentage(count(*), WHERE numeric(httpResponseCode) < 500) - 99.9) / 0.1 * 100, 0), 100) AS 'budget % remaining' FROM Transaction WHERE appName LIKE 'instant-api%' AND service = 'api' AND request.uri = '/webhook/new' SINCE 30 days ago

widgets.title: Provisioner gRPC latency p50/p95/p99 (1h) — TODO confirm Span event source

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT percentile(duration.ms, 50, 95, 99) FROM Span WHERE service.name = 'instant-api' AND name LIKE 'grpc.%' TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 1 hour ago

rawConfiguration.text:
## SLO definitions

| SLI | Target | Window | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| `POST /db/new` success rate | > 99.5% | 30d | Canonical agent provisioning path. The wedge — must be near-perfect. |
| `POST /deploy/new` success rate | > 99.0% | 30d | The bundle wedge (zero-click deploy). Multi-step Kaniko + k8s + cert-manager pipeline → slightly looser target. |
| `GET /api/v1/resources` p95 latency | < 200ms | 30d | Dashboard read path; every authenticated UI page hits this. Latency drives perceived dashboard speed. |
| `POST /webhook/new` success rate | > 99.9% | 30d | Smallest blast radius (Redis-only), so failures are cheapest to fix and should be rarest. |

Budget-remaining widgets show how much of the 30-day error budget is still available (0% = SLO breached). Red below 25% — page the team.

**Provisioner gRPC latency** widget assumes `Span` events are emitted by the api repo's OTEL tracer for gRPC calls to `instant-provisioner.instant-infra.svc.cluster.local:50051`. If no data shows up, confirm `OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT` is set in `k8s/app.yaml` and gRPC client instrumentation is wired in api/main.go. Until confirmed, this widget is a no-op.
